title: cineraria ngwenyensis
intro: Cineraria ngwenyensis, also known as the bush iris, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cineraria ngwenyensis include treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
